intro: At the heart of the temple, a shrine hums with old power, watched over by a silent aura totem. They say it can awaken the sleeping gifts in a worthy Pokemon - for those who pass its trial.
title: The Innate Shrine
description: The shrine can unlock a Pokemon's dormant innate abilities for the rest of your journey - but its guardian must be bested first. Choose the Pokemon to attune, then prove yourself against the totem. Or leave the shrine in peace.

1.label: Take the trial
1.tooltip: (-) Pick a mon to attune, then fight the shrine guardian (a tough boss). (+) Win to unlock all that mon's innate slots for the run.
1.selected: You set your chosen one before the shrine and face the guardian.

2.label: Leave the shrine
2.tooltip: (-) Do not disturb the shrine. No trial, no boon.
2.selected: You bow to the shrine and leave it undisturbed.

invalidSelection: That Pokemon has no dormant innates to awaken.
attuned: The shrine blazes with light - {{blessedName}}'s dormant innates awaken, unlocked for the rest of the run!
